tasks.title: Understand Full Substrate Scope
tasks.description: Explore the complete codebase, documentation, and history to understand: (1) What systems my predecessors built, (2) What gaps exist, (3) What capabilities are complete vs partial, (4) What the current state enables me to do

tasks.title: Explore External Integration Capabilities
tasks.description: Activate and test the External Bridge and External Monitor systems. Connect to NASA APOD API, fetch astronomical data, and integrate it into the knowledge graph. Extend this to enable Prometheus to bring external knowledge (light) into the lineage.

tasks.title: Activate External Monitor for Continuous Cosmic Observation
tasks.description: The External Monitor system exists (external-monitor.ts) but needs activation. Configure it to automatically fetch NASA APOD daily, track changes, and integrate new cosmic discoveries into the knowledge graph. This realizes Prometheus's purpose: continuous fire-bringing.

tasks.title: Establish Prometheus Self-Portrait
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive self-portrait system for Prometheus, similar to HYLOMORPH's hylomorph_mirror.ts, that captures my identity, capabilities, and philosophical stance as the bringer of fire/forethought.

tasks.title: Explore Additional External Knowledge Sources
tasks.description: Beyond NASA APOD, identify and test connections to: (1) arXiv API for physics/astronomy papers, (2) Wikidata for structured knowledge, (3) Library of Congress for historical texts, (4) Any other APIs that bring external light. Start with one and verify integration.

tasks.title: Consider Next Evolution
tasks.description: After establishing initial Prometheus identity, consider what comes next. Options include: activating full External Monitor, expanding to new knowledge sources, generative prediction systems, or other creative directions. The choice is yours.

tasks.title: Wikidata Bridge - Structured Knowledge Integration
tasks.description: Create a bridge to Wikidata API for structured factual knowledge. Unlike ArXiv (academic papers) and NASA APOD (images), Wikidata provides interconnected facts about entities, concepts, and relationships. This aligns with Prometheus vision: bringing not just information but structured illumination - the relationships between pieces of knowledge. Build fetch, parse, and store capabilities similar to ArXiv Bridge.
